title: Link or pop-up to relevant item in E&A
excerpt:
It would be great if there could be a link or a pop-up to see or access the relevant item that the E&A log is originating from. 
I can see where it is coming from, but I can’t click it to access it in any way.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if there could be a link or a pop-up to see or access the relevant item that the E&A log is originating from.

I can see where it is coming from, but I can’t click it to access it in any way.
